Source: Anthropic API Docs
URL: https://platform.claude.com/docs/api/getting-started
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Anthropic API Overview

## Base URL
RESTful API at https://api.anthropic.com

## Available APIs (GA)
- Messages API: POST /v1/messages — Conversational interactions
- Message Batches API: POST /v1/messages/batches — Async bulk processing, 50% cost reduction
- Token Counting API: POST /v1/messages/count_tokens — Pre-send token estimation
- Models API: GET /v1/models — List available models and their details

## Beta APIs
- Files API: POST /v1/files, GET /v1/files — Upload/manage files across API calls
- Skills API: POST /v1/skills, GET /v1/skills — Create/manage custom agent skills

## Authentication
- x-api-key header (required)
- anthropic-version header (required, e.g., 2023-06-01)
- content-type: application/json (required)

## SDKs
Official SDKs for Python, TypeScript, Java, Go, C#, Ruby, PHP
- Automatic header management, type-safe handling, retry logic, streaming

## Current Models
- claude-opus-4-6 (most capable)
- claude-sonnet-4-6 (balanced)
- claude-haiku-4-5 (fastest)

## Request Size Limits
- Standard endpoints: 32 MB
- Batch API: 256 MB
- Files API: 500 MB
- Note: Vertex AI limits to 30 MB; Amazon Bedrock limits to 20 MB

## Response Headers
- request-id: globally unique identifier
- anthropic-organization-id: org ID for the API key used

## Rate Limits
- Organized into usage tiers with spend limits and RPM/TPM limits
- Priority Tier available (enhanced service levels with committed spend) via sales

## Platform Availability
- Direct API (Anthropic)
- Amazon Bedrock (AWS)
- Vertex AI (Google Cloud)
- Azure AI (Microsoft Azure)

## Data Residency
inference_geo parameter for geographic control ("global" or "us")

## Key Notes
- Models API now returns capabilities object (max_input_tokens, max_tokens, capabilities)
- Third-party platforms may have feature delays vs. direct API
- API versioning guarantees apply to GA features

## Additional Service Endpoints (from page config)
- MCP Apps Sandbox Proxy: https://sandbox.claudemcpcontent.com/mcp_apps
- User Content Renderer: https://www.claudeusercontent.com
